## Description

What would you like to add or improve?

## Motivation

Why would this be useful? What problem does it solve?

## Suggested implementation

How might this work? (Feel free to skip if unsure.)

## Alternatives

Any other approaches you've considered?

## Additional context

Screenshots, links, or other context.
